tags.name: Santa Cruz Branch
tags.owner: Santa Cruz County Regional Transportation Commission

tags.alt_name: Monterey Bay Sanctuary Scenic Trail Network
tags.name: Coastal Rail Trail
tags.note: This is MBSST-by-bicycle-and-pedestrian. It is also CycleNet 40 (to be rcn=40), CycleNet is a bicycle route numbering protocol proposal before SCCRTC. With USBR 95, Coastal Rail Trail (as rcn=30 in CycleNet) was "equated" with MBSST.
tags.note:2: This is the bicycle trail, for the pedestrian trail with the same name, see relation/13997450

tags.alt_name: Monterey Bay Sanctuary Scenic Trail Network
tags.name: Coastal Rail Trail
tags.note: This is the pedestrian trail, for the bicycle trail with the same name, see relation/9400673
